business_problem: Renesas, a global semiconductor company supplying microcontrollers, analog, power, and SoC products for automotive, industrial, IoT, and infrastructure markets, needed to retire aging on-premises Oracle Database hardware while preserving low-latency database performance for global engineering, manufacturing, and supply-chain applications.
solution_summary: Renesas Electronics, a global semiconductor manufacturer, migrated database workloads from on-premises Exadata Cloud@Customer to Oracle Exadata Database Service on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure to achieve greater global elasticity and low-latency access for users across multiple continents. The migration enabled headquarters in Japan and design centers in Germany to experience consistent sub-millisecond latency through OCI's cross-region networking and distributed architecture, supporting 24/7 global operations with improved performance and reduced infrastructure management burden.
products_used: Oracle Exadata Database Service on OCI
business_outcome: Renesas eliminated on-premises database hardware management, achieved consistent global low-latency performance via OCI regions, and gained the elasticity of Exadata cloud services for its engineering and supply-chain databases.
metrics: Global semiconductor manufacturer with operations across Asia, Europe, and Americas
architecture_clues: Oracle Exadata Database Service deployed on OCI public-cloud regions
Global distributed cloud regions used to keep latency low for international users
evidence_quotes: Renesas runs its core Oracle Database workloads on Oracle Exadata Database Service on OCI to retire aging on-premises infrastructure and maintain global low-latency performance.

solution_components.name: Oracle Exadata Database Service on OCI
solution_components.role: High-performance, managed database service providing consistent low-latency access across global regions; eliminates on-premises infrastructure management.

solution_components.name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure
solution_components.role: Multi-region architecture with cross-networking enabling low-latency global connectivity from Japan headquarters and Germany design centers.

data_flow: Database queries from Japan HQ and Germany design centers distributed across OCI regions via cross-region networking; query results return with minimal latency; semiconductor design and IoT application data stored centrally with regional caching.
